weapons.name: Bloodpact's Pledge
weapons.description: This weapon is a testament to the unbreakable blood pact: One shall never betray, never surrender, and fight until the last drop of blood is shed.
weapons.availability: Reward from The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier quest

weapons.name: Variation
weapons.description: A pair of pistols that can adapt to any situation, changing their form and function as needed.

weapons.name: Emerald of Genesis
weapons.description: A sword forged from a mysterious green crystal that resonates with the power of creation.

weapons.name: Stellar Symphony
weapons.description: A rectifier that channels the power of the stars, creating a symphony of cosmic energy.

weapons.name: Call of the Abyss
weapons.description: A massive blade that resonates with the depths of the abyss, calling forth dark energy.

weapons.name: Stringmaster
weapons.description: Gauntlets that allow the wielder to manipulate invisible strings, controlling the battlefield like a puppet master.

weapons.name: Red Spring
weapons.description: Dual pistols that bloom with crimson energy, like flowers in spring.

weapons.name: Jinzhou Keeper
weapons.description: A traditional sword used by the guardians of Jinzhou, passed down through generations.

weapons.name: Novaburst
weapons.description: A rectifier that channels energy like a supernova, releasing bursts of power.

weapons.name: Whispers of Sirens
weapons.description: A mysterious rectifier that resonates with the deep sea. Its wielder can hear the whispers of ancient sirens calling from the abyss.
